description: Establish a clean workspace by removing the default Amateur module configuration. Create a ground station for the National Hurricane Center (Miami_NHC) at 25.7543 N, 80.3800 W, Altitude 2m. Configure a 3-module tracking dashboard for NOAA polar-orbiting satellites NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), and NOAA 19 (33591), with each module assigned to Miami_NHC. Module 1 ('Global_Wx') must use the Map-only layout, Module 2 ('Radar_Wx') must use the Polar-only layout, and Module 3 ('Schedule_Wx') must use the List-only layout. Update global preferences to show 2 orbits for the Map Ground Track and set the time format to UTC.
